title: Remove Deepslate
description: Get rid of Deepslate from the world generation.
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## History
Deepslate was added in 1.18, as apart of the Caves and Cliffs update, as to compensate for the extra 64 blocks added below the original bedrock level of y = 0. It functions the same as Stone, however, it is mined slower and some consider it ugly. 

## Mods goal
This mod aims to replace Deepslate with Stone, mirroring the original preview screenshots when this update was announced. This makes mining at this level much easier earlier on.

## Screenshots
![A cave at y=-34, without Deepslate, stone in its place instead.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb9c4c3f0a0dba16fff7846f86daf33555222581.png)
